title: T-055 — UI: TEC-070 D365 Sync Dashboard + TEC-071 Manual Sync Trigger
prompt:
# T-055 — UI: TEC-070 D365 Sync Dashboard + TEC-071 Manual Sync Trigger

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §13.8 TEC-070, §13.8 TEC-071
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:904-935` (d365_status_screen); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:542-559` (d365_item_sync_confirm_modal)

## Goal
D365 dashboard + manual sync trigger modal.

Dashboard polls /api/technical/d365/health every 30s. Trigger modal asks for entity (items|bom|formula) + direction (pull|push). Shows last_sync_at + success-rate sparkline.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/d365/page.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/d365/_components/manual-sync-modal.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-070-d365-dashboard.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- DLQ manager (T-058)
- Drift resolution (T-060)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the dashboard renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:904-935 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:542-559, then KPI cards, last-runs table, modal field set, and Cancel/Confirm button order match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given integration.d365.enabled=false, when on dashboard, then a banner shows 'Disabled' state.
3. Given user lacks technical.d365.sync.trigger, when on dashboard, then 'Sync now' button is hidden.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + RBAC + flag-off banner.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-070-d365-dashboard.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not surface raw credentials in UI.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- D365 UI must present optional integration/export/import from Monopilot-owned data; any import/overwrite action must be authorized and audited, never silent or canonical-by-default.
- D365 work must be optional integration/export/import from Monopilot-owned data; no strategic dependency or silent canonical overwrite.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:904-935` (d365_status_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:542-559` (d365_item_sync_confirm_modal) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
